case_title: GEISSLER, RAPLH R.C. DBA GEISSLER PROPERTIES VS HARDCASTLE, KELLI et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEISSLER, RAPLH R.C. DBA GEISSLER PROPERTIES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HARDCASTLE, KELLI HARDCASTLE, KRISTA D. PLTF HAS BEEN PAID RENT BY TRACY HAYNES FOR 3 MOS. ANY OTHER DAMAGES WOULD BE PREMATURE AT THIS TIME. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GEISSLER, RAPLH R.C. DBA GEISSLER PROPERTIES AS TO DEFENDANT HARDCASTLE, KELLI HARDCASTLE, KRISTA D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-1995 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT C
